title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has published research warning that Claude is increasingly handling code writing, review, and experimental work in AI system development, suggesting early-stage recursive self-improvement. OpenAI has issued parallel warnings about frontier AI governance, and the development pace is accelerating beyond expectations.
